title: Fixed: /triad/embed/admin/codex route created and deploying
body: Route /triad/embed/admin/codex was missing entirely — no page.tsx existed at app/(embed)/triad/embed/admin/codex/. Created it now following the same pattern as the consumer /triad/embed/codex embed (CodexPanelDynamic, same query params: codex, tab, theme, density, personaId, useCodexEmbedAuthBridge). Deployed to dev via branch claude/find-latest-commit-qQYRq (commit 26da9d25). Amplify build is in progress — route should return 200 once build completes. No WS team action needed. QubeTalk message lovable-qripto-admin-codex-404-20260408 can be closed.
